supported_with_caveat.statement: The staged pointer branch closes exact rollout on the current toy suite only under the strongest opcode_legal regime.

The broadened precision suite sharpens a current-suite boundary: new high-address memory families fail immediately under float32 single-head, while current decomposition schemes remain stable on the exported suite.

negative_closures.statement: No fair fourth compatibility regime is justified on the expanded staged-pointer suite.

unsupported_broadenings: A fair learned executor claim independent of strong legality masks.
A broad long-horizon float32 robustness claim.
Any compiled-program claim broader than tiny typed bytecode.
gated_next_steps: Use this claim freeze as the only narrative source for M6 typed-bytecode planning.
Keep M5 frozen as the standard-softmax negative control unless the fair label/decode space changes.
Translate the freeze into paper figures and tables under P1.
